mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO account_import_detail ( batch_id, line_no, ws_phone, raw_payload, source_entry_name, account_id, parse_result, fail_reason, login_result, online_phase, online_dispatched_at, login_settled_at, dispatch_attempts, login_reason, created_at ) VALUES
( #{r.batchId}, #{r.lineNo}, #{r.wsPhone}, #{r.rawPayload}, #{r.sourceEntryName}, #{r.accountId}, #{r.parseResult}, #{r.failReason}, #{r.loginResult}, COALESCE(#{r.onlinePhase}, 0), #{r.onlineDispatchedAt}, #{r.loginSettledAt}, COALESCE(#{r.dispatchAttempts}, 0), #{r.loginReason}, #{r.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id AS tenantId, batch_id AS batchId, line_no AS lineNo, ws_phone AS wsPhone, account_id AS accountId, parse_result AS parseResult, fail_reason AS failReason, login_result AS loginResult, online_phase AS onlinePhase, online_dispatched_at AS onlineDispatchedAt, login_settled_at AS loginSettledAt, dispatch_attempts AS dispatchAttempts, login_reason AS loginReason, created_at AS createdAt FROM account_import_detail WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND online_phase = #{queuedPhase} AND parse_result = #{successParseResult} AND account_id IS NOT NULL AND login_result IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE account_import_detail SET online_phase = #{dispatchedPhase}, online_dispatched_at = #{dispatchedAt}, dispatch_attempts = dispatch_attempts + 1 WHERE online_phase = #{queuedPhase} AND id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account_import_detail d JOIN account_import_batch b ON d.batch_id = b.id AND d.tenant_id = b.tenant_id WHERE d.batch_id = #{batchId}

SELECT d.id, d.line_no AS lineNo, d.ws_phone AS wsPhone, d.account_id AS accountId, d.parse_result AS parseResult, d.fail_reason AS failReason, d.login_result AS loginResult, d.created_at AS createdAt, g.name AS groupName FROM account_import_detail d JOIN account_import_batch b ON d.batch_id = b.id AND d.tenant_id = b.tenant_id LEFT JOIN account_group g ON b.account_group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE d.batch_id = #{batchId}
ORDER BY d.line_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
